creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: eadler
Date: Tue Dec 10 05:01:01 2013
New Revision: 259156
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/base/259156

Log:
  mtest(8): use correct macro in mdoc
  
  The An macros is used for authors while the Ar macro is used for arguments.
  AFAIK mcast-addr and ifname are not authors.
  
  PR:		docs/184649
  Submitted by:	cnst++
  MFC After:	3 days

Modified:
  head/usr.sbin/mtest/mtest.8

Modified: head/usr.sbin/mtest/mtest.8
==============================================================================
--- head/usr.sbin/mtest/mtest.8	Tue Dec 10 04:57:56 2013	(r259155)
+++ head/usr.sbin/mtest/mtest.8	Tue Dec 10 05:01:01 2013	(r259156)
@@ -131,9 +131,9 @@ to allow traffic from source
 Print
 .Ar n
 source filter entries for
-.An mcast-addr
+.Ar mcast-addr
 on interface
-.An ifname .
+.Ar ifname .
 .\"
 .Pp
 .It Ic f Ar filename
